KineticAge — MVP Product Backlog: How to read the Sprint sheets
Each Sprint sheet lists the User Stories assigned to that sprint along with their Feature, Epic, Priority, Complexity, and Sprint Goal.
Story point / velocity estimates are intentionally omitted — use the Complexity column with your team's own historical velocity to size sprints during sprint planning.

Sprint sequencing follows dependency order: Authentication & Onboarding & Health Metrics (Sprint 1) must exist before Personas & the Recommendation Engine (Sprint 2) can be personalized; the Workout Session & AI Avatar foundation (Sprint 3) must exist before Gamification events have data to act on (Sprint 4); Progress Tracking and remaining dashboard widgets close out the MVP (Sprint 5).
